title: Movement analysis and feedback systems, applications, devices, and methods of production thereof
abstract: Contemplated systems for monitoring and analysis of human motion synthesis are disclosed herein that include: at least one garment configured to be worn by a user, at least one inertial sensor, wherein the at least one inertial sensor is integrated with or into the at least one garment, an information system, wherein the information system communicates with the at least one inertial sensor to produce a set of data, at least one musculorientation metric generated by the information system, and at least one performance report that is produced from the analysis of the at least one musculorientation metric.
claims: 1. A system for monitoring and analysis of human motion synthesis, comprising: at least one garment configured to be worn by a user, at least one inertial sensor, wherein the at least one inertial sensor is integrated with or into the at least one garment, at least one electromyography sensor, wherein the at least one electromyography sensor is integrated with or into the at least one garment, a two-way communications system, wherein the two-way communications system comprises at least one wireless link, an information system, wherein the information system communicates with the at least one inertial sensor through the two-way communications system, and the at least one electromyography sensor to produce a set of data, at least one musculorientation metric generated by the information system, and at least one performance report that is produced from an analysis of the at least one musculorientation metric, wherein the at least one performance report includes a musculoskeletal model, a vibrotactile or inertial interface, an IMU motion model, and an experimental procedure script.
